name: Dulacca Wind Farm
current_developer: Dulacca Energy Project Co Pty Ltd
notable: 43x Vestas V150-4.2MW. CleanCo 126MW PPA. RES developed, Octopus acquired. Opened Oct 2023.

timeline.title: EPBC Referral 2019/8607
timeline.detail: Dulacca Solar Farm — Not Controlled Action

timeline.title: Construction commenced
timeline.detail: Construction began for 43 Vestas V150-4.2 MW turbines

timeline.title: Octopus acquires from RES
timeline.detail: Octopus Investments Australia acquired the project from RES

timeline.title: Commercial operations commenced
timeline.detail: Commencement date from AEMO registration via OpenElectricity.

timeline.title: First generation recorded
timeline.detail: First market dispatch data recorded in AEMO systems.

eis_specs.document_title: Dulacca Wind Farm EIS — Coordinator-General's Report (QLD DSDILGP)
eis_specs.hub_height_note: Standard hub height for V150-4.2 on QLD Western Downs plains
eis_specs.wind_speed_period: Mean annual wind speed at hub height; Western Downs, QLD near Miles
eis_specs.connection_substation_name: Dulacca 132/66 kV substation (new, on-site), connected to Powerlink Wandoan corridor
eis_specs.connection_distance_note: ~28 km of 132 kV line to Powerlink network in the Wandoan/Western Downs corridor, QLD.
eis_specs.connection_augmentation: New 132 kV connection to Powerlink grid. Powerlink Western Downs transmission corridor augmented for multiple CIS Round projects.
eis_specs.notes: 181 MW (43 x 4.2 MW Vestas V150), near Dulacca/Miles, Western Downs, QLD. Developer: CWP Energy (now RES). EPC: RES Australia. QLD EIS approved 2019. Now operating. QLD LTESA contract holder (CIS Round 1).
